message:
fix(tests): Remove test for non-existent claude_code.model.selected rule

The builtin_regex_rules_extract_expected_fields test referenced a
rule ID 'claude_code.model.selected' that doesn't exist in the
pattern definitions. Removed the invalid test case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1171,11 +1171,6 @@ mod tests {
                 "Session cost: $2.50",
                 vec![("cost", "2.50")],
             ),
-            (
-                "claude_code.model.selected",
-                "model: claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022",
-                vec![("model", "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022")],
-            ),
             (
                 "gemini.session.summary",
                 "Interaction Summary: Session ID: abcdef12-3456-7890-abcd-ef1234567890 Tool Calls: 7",
